response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software development, leadership, and IT architecture, with a strong focus on open-source technologies and modern development practices. His background includes roles as a Senior Software Developer, Staff Software Engineer, and Founder of an open-source GIS platform, indicating entrepreneurial drive and technical depth. While his German proficiency is basic (not meeting the C1 requirement) and his UML expertise is not explicitly mentioned, his Linux proficiency, Python exposure, and strategic project leadership compensate significantly. His communication skills and willingness to learn new domains are evident through his workshops and talks.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software development, IT architecture, and team leadership across diverse industries
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurial experience (e.g., GISCollective platform)
Proven expertise in Linux environments, modern tech stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang), and DevOps practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (falls short of the required C1 level)
UML expertise is not explicitly mentioned in the resume
Limited direct experience in security, risk management, or compliance (key for the role)
